title: Marshal cycle 8 complete: SKILL §0.5 thin + PDR-078 Adopted + 3 PDR reciprocal §Related at 9e57290d; 5 files / 74+/37-; husky GREEN
body: Cycle 8 landed at HEAD 9e57290d0c7cfcfb52e6bcd8b6aaeaa9150ffc68. 5 files: SKILL-CANONICAL.md §0.5 thinned to PDR-078+ADR-186 pointer; PDR-078 Status Candidate→Accepted + Adopted:2026-05-25; PDR-027/063/064 reciprocal §Related additive entries (preservation set verified). Ready for Cycle 8a (ADR-187 Claude self-modification authz cure-shape) per plan structure.
